1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

A bottom graphic appears: "림프 순환 30초 운동 1단계 <아침 림프 마사지>". The group includes a woman in a white coat, one in a floral shirt, a central figure in a black top and maroon leggings, and an older woman in beige.
[4-8] The graphic vanishes. The central woman closes her eyes; the woman in beige looks down.
[8-12] A close-up shows the central woman, labeled "운동처방사 김선우", pursing her lips. Text "<목> 마사지!" appears. The shot widens as all five women touch their necks.
[12-14] The central woman raises her right hand. New text appears: "관절을 꺾어 엄지와 검지로 V자를 만든다". The others adjust hand positions near their necks.

[16-20] The woman in the black top moves her right hand, forming a V-shape with her thumb and index finger, towards her face and jawline while speaking. Behind her, the woman in the floral shirt observes, occasionally mimicking the gesture. The orange text box displays '목 림프마사지' and step '01' with the instruction '엄지와 검지로 V자를 만든다'. The pink name tag '운동처방사 김선우' is visible on the central woman's chest.
[20-24] She pinches the area below her ear using the V-shape grip. Yellow animated lines appear next to her hand to emphasize the massage point. The woman in the floral shirt continues to watch from behind. The instruction box and name tag remain on screen.
[24-28] The scene cuts to an extreme close-up of a neck and ear featuring a silver hoop earring. A hand with red nail polish pinches the protruding muscle below the earlobe. The orange text box updates to step '02' with the instruction '귀 아래 튀어나온 근육을 잡아준다'. The fingers maintain a firm grip on the neck area.

[30-32] A close-up shows a hand with red nail polish gripping a neck muscle while the text "목 림프 마사지 03 꾹꾹 누르면서 아래로 내려온다" is displayed; fingers apply pressure and stroke downward. [32-36] The scene cuts to a wide studio shot where a woman in a black off-shoulder top demonstrates the downward massage. A woman in a purple top mimics the gesture, a woman in a floral shirt touches her jawline, and a woman in a beige outfit with a green brooch smiles. [36-42] The woman in black approaches the woman in beige, placing hands on her neck and jawline. As the woman in beige tilts her head back smiling, a green caption appears reading "목을 돌리면 튀어나오는 근육". The woman in black then pinches the side of the beige-clad woman's neck to highlight the protruding muscle.

An orange box with Korean text and 01 appears at the bottom left. A pink name tag is visible on her chest. The woman in the floral shirt stands behind her.

[28-30] The orange instruction box updates to step 03 with new Korean text indicating downward movement. In the extreme close-up, the hand with red nail polish presses firmly on the neck muscle below the ear and begins a downward sliding motion, transitioning from the previous static holding position.

[42-44] The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of the woman in the beige top's neck and ear area. A hand pinches the muscle below her earlobe, showing the skin being manipulated. You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
